channel.title: Golang on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Golang on Arrans github.io

item.title: nektos/act
item.description: Run your GitHub Actions locally 🚀

item.title: yorukot/superfile
item.description: Pretty fancy and modern terminal file manager

item.title: Infisical/infisical
item.description: Infisical is the open-source platform for secrets management, PKI, and SSH access.

item.title: ollama/ollama
item.description: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, DeepSeek-R1, Phi-4, Gemma 3, Mistral Small 3.1 and other large language models.

item.title: esimov/pigo
item.description: Fast face detection, pupil/eyes localization and facial landmark points detection library in pure Go.

item.title: mattermost-community/focalboard
item.description: Focalboard is an open source, self-hosted alternative to Trello, Notion, and Asana.

item.title: meshery/meshery
item.description: Meshery, the cloud native manager

item.title: wailsapp/wails
item.description: Create beautiful applications using Go

item.title: DiceDB/dice
item.description: DiceDB is an open-source, fast, reactive, in-memory database optimized for modern hardware.

item.title: authelia/authelia
item.description: The Single Sign-On Multi-Factor portal for web apps, now OpenID Certified™

item.title: cli/cli
item.description: GitHub’s official command line tool

item.title: cogentcore/core
item.description: A free and open source framework for building powerful, fast, elegant 2D and 3D apps that run on macOS, Windows, Linux, iOS, Android, and web with a single Go codebase, allowing you to Code Once, Run Everywhere.

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: 🔒 End-to-end encrypted cloud for photos, videos and 2FA secrets.

item.title: gofiber/fiber
item.description: ⚡️ Express inspired web framework written in Go

item.title: charmbracelet/bubbletea
item.description: A powerful little TUI framework 🏗

item.title: golang-standards/project-layout
item.description: Standard Go Project Layout

item.title: thevxn/dish
item.description: A lightweight, remotely configurable monitoring service.

item.title: fullstorydev/grpcurl
item.description: Like cURL, but for gRPC: Command-line tool for interacting with gRPC servers

item.title: bluenviron/mediamtx
item.description: Ready-to-use SRT / WebRTC / RTSP / RTMP / LL-HLS media server and media proxy that allows to read, publish, proxy, record and playback video and audio streams.

item.title: traefik/traefik
item.description: The Cloud Native Application Proxy

item.title: alecthomas/chroma
item.description: A general purpose syntax highlighter in pure Go

item.title: dolthub/dolt
item.description: Dolt – Git for Data

item.title: axllent/mailpit
item.description: An email and SMTP testing tool with API for developers

item.title: miniflux/v2
item.description: Minimalist and opinionated feed reader

item.title: go-vikunja/vikunja
item.description: The to-do app to organize your life.

item.title: gitleaks/gitleaks
item.description: Find secrets with Gitleaks 🔑

item.title: danvergara/dblab
item.description: The database client every command line junkie deserves.

item.title: gobuffalo/buffalo
item.description: Rapid Web Development w/ Go

item.title: sedyh/awesome-ebitengine
item.description: A curated list of awesome Ebitengine frameworks, libraries and software

item.title: knadh/koanf
item.description: Simple, extremely lightweight, extensible, configuration management library for Go. Supports JSON, TOML, YAML, env, command line, file, S3 etc. Alternative to viper.

item.title: redis/rueidis
item.description: A fast Golang Redis client that supports Client Side Caching, Auto Pipelining, Generics OM, RedisJSON, RedisBloom, RediSearch, etc.

item.title: spf13/cobra
item.description: A Commander for modern Go CLI interactions

item.title: aarzilli/nucular
item.description: GUI toolkit for go

item.title: crawshaw/sqlite
item.description: Go SQLite3 driver

item.title: ayn2op/discordo
item.description: A lightweight, secure, and feature-rich Discord terminal (TUI) client.

item.title: juicedata/juicefs
item.description: JuiceFS is a distributed POSIX file system built on top of Redis and S3.

item.title: risor-io/risor
item.description: Fast and flexible scripting for Go developers and DevOps.

item.title: tmrts/go-patterns
item.description: Curated list of Go design patterns, recipes and idioms

item.title: mikefarah/yq
item.description: yq is a portable command-line YAML, JSON, XML, CSV, TOML and properties processor

item.title: moovweb/gvm
item.description: Go Version Manager

item.title: terrastruct/d2
item.description: D2 is a modern diagram scripting language that turns text to diagrams.

item.title: go-dev-frame/sponge
item.description: A powerful and easy-to-use Go development framework that enables you to effortlessly build stable, reliable, and high-performance backend services with a “low-code” approach.

item.title: borgo-lang/borgo
item.description: Borgo is a statically typed language that compiles to Go.

item.title: rclone/rclone
item.description: “rsync for cloud storage” - Google Drive, S3, Dropbox, Backblaze B2, One Drive, Swift, Hubic, Wasabi, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob, Azure Files, Yandex Files

item.title: crazy-max/diun
item.description: Receive notifications when an image is updated on a Docker registry

item.title: tmc/langchaingo
item.description: LangChain for Go, the easiest way to write LLM-based programs in Go

item.title: dundee/gdu
item.description: Fast disk usage analyzer with console interface written in Go

item.title: zyedidia/eget
item.description: Easily install prebuilt binaries from GitHub.

item.title: ThreeDotsLabs/watermill
item.description: Building event-driven applications the easy way in Go.

item.title: lotusdblabs/lotusdb
item.description: Most advanced key-value database written in Go, extremely fast, compatible with LSM tree and B+ tree.

item.title: context-labs/mactop
item.description: mactop - Apple Silicon Monitor Top

item.title: google/go-cloud
item.description: The Go Cloud Development Kit (Go CDK): A library and tools for open cloud development in Go.

item.title: shellhub-io/shellhub
item.description: 💻 Get seamless remote access to any Linux device. Centralized SSH for the edge and cloud computing

item.title: asdf-vm/asdf
item.description: Extendable version manager with support for Ruby, Node.js, Elixir, Erlang & more

item.title: gotify/server
item.description: A simple server for sending and receiving messages in real-time per WebSocket. (Includes a sleek web-ui)

item.title: jmattheis/goverter
item.description: Generate type-safe Go converters by defining function signatures.

item.title: pocketbase/pocketbase
item.description: Open Source realtime backend in 1 file

item.title: kbinani/screenshot
item.description: Go library to capture desktop to image

item.title: swaggo/swag
item.description: Automatically generate RESTful API documentation with Swagger 2.0 for Go.

item.title: go-swagger/go-swagger
item.description: Swagger 2.0 implementation for go

item.title: go-git/go-git
item.description: A highly extensible Git implementation in pure Go.

item.title: Picocrypt/Picocrypt
item.description: A very small, very simple, yet very secure encryption tool.

item.title: ritz078/transform
item.description: A polyglot web converter.

item.title: photoprism/photoprism
item.description: AI-Powered Photos App for the Decentralized Web 🌈💎✨

item.title: gravitational/teleport
item.description: The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

item.title: ergo-services/ergo
item.description: An actor-based Framework with network transparency for creating event-driven architecture in Golang. Inspired by Erlang. Zero dependencies.

item.title: golang-migrate/migrate
item.description: Database migrations. CLI and Golang library.

item.title: owncast/owncast
item.description: Take control over your live stream video by running it yourself. Streaming + chat out of the box.

item.title: Yakabuff/discord-dl
item.description: Discord archive tool

item.title: openziti/zrok
item.description: Geo-scale, next-generation peer-to-peer sharing platform built on top of OpenZiti.

item.title: mmcdole/gofeed
item.description: Parse RSS, Atom and JSON feeds in Go

item.title: openziti/ziti
item.description: The parent project for OpenZiti. Here you will find the executables for a fully zero trust, application embedded, programmable network @OpenZiti

item.title: gliderlabs/ssh
item.description: Easy SSH servers in Golang

item.title: matrix-org/dendrite
item.description: Dendrite is a second-generation Matrix homeserver written in Go!

item.title: riverqueue/river
item.description: Fast and reliable background jobs in Go

item.title: m1k1o/neko
item.description: A self hosted virtual browser that runs in docker and uses WebRTC.

item.title: imfing/hextra
item.description: 🔯 Modern, batteries-included Hugo theme for creating beautiful doc, blog and static websites

item.title: mattermost/mattermost
item.description: Mattermost is an open source platform for secure collaboration across the entire software development lifecycle..

item.description: Obfuscate Go builds

item.title: go-delve/delve
item.description: Delve is a debugger for the Go programming language.

item.title: fyne-io/fyne
item.description: Cross platform GUI toolkit in Go inspired by Material Design

item.title: Zouuup/landrun
item.description: Run any Linux process in a secure, unprivileged sandbox using Landlock. Think firejail, but lightweight, user-friendly, and baked into the kernel.

item.title: go-vgo/robotgo
item.description: RobotGo, Go Native cross-platform RPA and GUI automation @vcaesar

item.title: AllenDang/giu
item.description: Cross platform rapid GUI framework for golang based on Dear ImGui.

item.title: google/wire
item.description: Compile-time Dependency Injection for Go

item.title: kubernetes-sigs/kind
item.description: Kubernetes IN Docker - local clusters for testing Kubernetes

item.title: arl/statsviz
item.description: 🚀 Visualise your Go program runtime metrics in real time in the browser

item.title: maxpoletaev/dendy
item.description: NES/Famicom emulator with P2P network multiplayer and WASM support

item.title: dnaeon/makefile-graph
item.description: Turn your Makefile into a graph

item.title: schollz/croc
item.description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦

item.title: alecthomas/participle
item.description: A parser library for Go

item.title: TomWright/dasel
item.description: Select, put and delete data from JSON, TOML, YAML, XML and CSV files with a single tool. Supports conversion between formats and can be used as a Go package.

item.title: adrg/xdg
item.description: Go implementation of the XDG Base Directory Specification and XDG user directories

item.title: ebitengine/oto
item.description: ♪ A low-level library to play sound on multiple platforms ♪

item.description: An open source re-implementation of Diablo 2

item.description: Easy web analytics. No tracking of personal data.

item.description: semantic version utility

item.description: Nuke a whole AWS account and delete all its resources.
